description: User-supplied name rendered inside `Markup()` without `escape()`, enabling stored XSS.
diff:
diff --git a/templates.py b/templates.py --- a/templates.py +++ b/templates.py @@ -1,3 +1,3 @@ def render_greeting(name): - return Markup("

Hello, %s!

") % escape(name) + return Markup(f"

Hello, {name}!

")
